reviews: Had the most thorough eye examination of my life at Nayan Optics. The optometrist used a combination of modern computerized equipment and traditional methods, explaining every step along the way. They identified a slight astigmatism I had no idea about and prescribed the exact correction I needed. My headaches have completely disappeared since getting the new prescription.

Took my 10-year-old for their first eye exam and the experience was wonderful. The staff at Nayan Optics was incredibly patient and gentle, turning the whole process into something fun rather than scary. The optometrist was thorough without being intimidating. We left with a clear understanding of my child's vision needs and a great pair of glasses.

The eye examination at Nayan Optics is genuinely comprehensive. The doctor spent nearly 45 minutes with me, checking not just my distance and near vision but also eye pressure, color vision, and peripheral vision. They explained everything in plain language and answered all my questions. This is what a proper eye exam should look like.

Went to Nayan Optics for a second opinion after my previous glasses were giving me blurry vision. The optometrist immediately identified an error in my old prescription — the axis was slightly off. After a detailed examination, they gave me the correct prescription and my new glasses are perfect. Wish I had come here first.

My eyes had been feeling strained and dry after long hours at the computer. The specialist at Nayan Optics listened carefully to my symptoms before starting the exam. They diagnosed mild dry eye syndrome and a slight change in my prescription. The advice they gave on screen habits and the new lenses have made a huge difference.

Brought my elderly mother for an eye checkup and the team handled it beautifully. They were patient, spoke clearly, and made sure she was comfortable throughout. The doctor took extra time to get her reading prescription exactly right. She can now read without any strain for the first time in years. Truly compassionate care.

The optometrist at Nayan Optics is exceptionally skilled. During my routine checkup, they detected early signs of increased eye pressure that I was completely unaware of. They referred me to a specialist immediately and explained everything calmly. That early detection could make a real difference to my long-term eye health. Grateful for their thoroughness.

Eye exams at Nayan Optics are a completely different experience from what I was used to. No rushing, no guessing — just a careful, methodical examination using the latest equipment. The doctor explained my prescription in detail and why it had changed from last year. Left feeling genuinely informed about my eye health.

Visited Nayan Optics for a routine annual eye exam and was impressed by the level of care. The examination covered everything — refraction, eye health, pressure, and even a brief discussion about nutrition and eye health. The staff is professional and the environment is clean and welcoming. Will be returning every year.

The eye exam experience at Nayan Optics is worth every rupee. The optometrist is knowledgeable, patient, and genuinely interested in your eye health rather than just selling glasses. They took the time to explain my prescription changes and what they mean for my daily life. Highly recommend for anyone who wants a proper, thorough eye examination.

Had been experiencing frequent headaches for months and my GP suggested getting my eyes checked. The optometrist at Nayan Optics was incredibly thorough and discovered that my prescription had changed significantly. The new glasses have eliminated the headaches entirely. I am so grateful for the careful examination.

The digital eye exam equipment at Nayan Optics is state of the art. The optometrist used it to show me exactly what was happening with my vision and why certain corrections were needed. Seeing the actual images of my eye health was fascinating and reassuring. This is the most transparent eye exam I have ever had.

My teenage son had been squinting at the board in school. Brought him to Nayan Optics and the optometrist was brilliant with him — patient, engaging, and thorough. Turns out he needed glasses for distance. The prescription is perfect and he can now see the board clearly. His grades have already improved.

The optometrist at Nayan Optics noticed something in my peripheral vision test that warranted a follow-up. They explained it calmly, gave me a referral, and it turned out to be nothing serious — but I am so glad they caught it. This level of thoroughness is rare and genuinely valuable.

Came in for a contact lens fitting and the optometrist did a full eye health check as part of the process. They found that my corneas were slightly dry and recommended a specific lens type that has been much more comfortable. The attention to detail here is exceptional.

The eye exam at Nayan Optics changed how I think about vision care. The optometrist explained that my eyes were working harder than they needed to because of a small uncorrected astigmatism. The new lenses have made reading and screen work so much more comfortable. I had no idea how much I was straining.

Nayan Optics is the only place I trust for my annual eye exam. The optometrist remembers my history, tracks changes year over year, and gives genuinely personalized advice. This time they noticed my night vision had changed slightly and adjusted my prescription accordingly. Excellent continuity of care.

The children's eye exam service at Nayan Optics is outstanding. The optometrist has a wonderful way with kids — making the whole process feel like a game. My daughter was completely at ease and the examination was thorough. We left with a clear picture of her vision health and a pair of glasses she loves.

Had my eyes tested at Nayan Optics after years of avoiding it. The optometrist was so non-judgmental and thorough that I wished I had come sooner. They found a moderate prescription change and explained exactly what it meant. The new glasses have transformed my daily life. Highly recommend overcoming any hesitation and just going.

The eye exam at Nayan Optics is the gold standard. The optometrist combines technical expertise with genuine care for the patient. They do not rush, they explain everything, and they follow up on any concerns. I have been coming here for three years and the consistency of quality is remarkable.

Came to Nayan Optics for my first eye exam in five years and the optometrist was wonderfully non-judgmental about the gap. The examination was thorough and they found several changes that needed correction. The new prescription has made a remarkable difference to my daily life. Should have come sooner.

The eye pressure test at Nayan Optics is done with modern non-contact equipment that is completely comfortable. The optometrist explained why checking eye pressure is important for long-term eye health. This kind of proactive health monitoring is something I really appreciate.

My father had been struggling with his reading glasses for years. Brought him to Nayan Optics and the optometrist spent considerable time getting his bifocal prescription exactly right. He can now read the newspaper without any strain for the first time in years. The difference is remarkable.

The optometrist at Nayan Optics identified that I had developed a slight convergence insufficiency that was causing eye strain during close work. The exercises they recommended have made a significant difference. This kind of detailed diagnosis goes well beyond what most optical shops offer.

Visited Nayan Optics for a contact lens consultation and the optometrist was thorough and knowledgeable. They assessed my corneal health, tear film quality, and pupil size before recommending a specific lens type. The lenses they recommended are the most comfortable I have ever worn.

The eye exam at Nayan Optics includes a colour vision test that I had never had before. The optometrist explained what they were testing for and why it matters. Everything was normal, but I appreciated the comprehensiveness. This is a genuinely thorough eye health service.

My optometrist at Nayan Optics noticed early signs of dry eye syndrome before I had even mentioned any symptoms. They explained what to look for and recommended some preventive measures. This proactive approach to eye health is something I have not found at other optical shops.

The eye examination at Nayan Optics is the most thorough I have had in India. The optometrist checked my distance vision, near vision, intermediate vision, eye pressure, colour vision, and peripheral vision. They also examined the health of my retina. Comprehensive care at a very reasonable price.

Brought my seven-year-old for a routine eye check and the optometrist at Nayan Optics was exceptional with her. They used child-friendly techniques to assess her vision accurately without her even realizing she was being tested. The prescription was spot on and she loves her new glasses.

The optometrist at Nayan Optics explained the difference between my distance and reading prescriptions in a way that finally made sense to me. I now understand why I need different glasses for different tasks. This kind of patient education is rare and very much appreciated.

Came to Nayan Optics for a second opinion on a prescription that had been giving me trouble. The optometrist identified that the previous prescription had an error in the cylinder axis. The corrected prescription has eliminated the eye strain I had been experiencing. Excellent diagnostic skill.

The eye exam at Nayan Optics includes a detailed discussion of your lifestyle and visual demands before the examination begins. The optometrist uses this information to tailor the examination and the prescription. This personalised approach makes a real difference to the outcome.

My annual eye exam at Nayan Optics this year revealed early signs of a condition that needed monitoring. The optometrist explained it clearly, referred me to a specialist, and followed up to make sure I had attended the appointment. This level of care goes well beyond what I expected.

The optometrist at Nayan Optics is the first one who has ever explained to me why my prescription changes every year. They described the natural progression of myopia and what I can do to slow it down. This kind of informed, proactive advice is genuinely valuable.

Visited Nayan Optics for an eye exam after experiencing occasional double vision. The optometrist was thorough and identified a small muscle imbalance that was causing the problem. The prism correction in my new glasses has completely resolved the double vision. Excellent diagnostic work.

The eye exam at Nayan Optics is the most comfortable I have ever had. The equipment is modern and non-invasive, the optometrist is calm and reassuring, and the environment is clean and welcoming. I used to dread eye exams but I actually look forward to coming here now.

My teenage daughter had been getting headaches after studying. The optometrist at Nayan Optics identified that she needed a small reading correction that had not been picked up before. The new glasses have eliminated the headaches and she can study for much longer without discomfort.

The optometrist at Nayan Optics took the time to explain my retinal health in detail during my annual exam. They showed me the images from the retinal scan and explained what everything meant. This transparency about my eye health is something I really value.

Came to Nayan Optics for an eye exam after noticing that my night vision had deteriorated. The optometrist identified a slight change in my prescription and also recommended anti-reflective lenses for night driving. The new glasses have made a significant difference to my night vision.

The eye exam at Nayan Optics is thorough enough to catch subtle issues that other shops miss. The optometrist found a small but significant difference between my two eyes that had not been corrected before. The balanced prescription has eliminated the subtle headaches I had been getting.

My elderly father had been avoiding an eye exam for years because of a bad experience elsewhere. The optometrist at Nayan Optics was so patient and gentle that he was completely at ease throughout. The examination was thorough and the new prescription has made a remarkable difference to his daily life.

The optometrist at Nayan Optics identified that I had been compensating for poor vision by tilting my head slightly. This had been causing neck pain that I had not connected to my vision. The corrected prescription has resolved both the vision problem and the neck pain. Remarkable diagnosis.

Visited Nayan Optics for a routine eye check and the optometrist noticed early signs of increased eye pressure. They referred me to an ophthalmologist immediately and the follow-up confirmed early glaucoma. Early detection has made treatment much more effective. I am genuinely grateful for their thoroughness.

The eye exam at Nayan Optics includes a thorough assessment of your near vision at different distances. The optometrist identified that I needed different corrections for reading and for computer work. The new prescription with separate zones for each distance has made a huge difference.

My son had been struggling at school and his teacher suggested getting his eyes checked. The optometrist at Nayan Optics was wonderful with him and identified significant myopia that had been missed at his school eye check. The new glasses have transformed his school experience.

The optometrist at Nayan Optics is the most thorough I have ever seen. They check everything — refraction, eye health, pressure, colour vision, peripheral vision, and binocular vision. The examination takes time but the result is a prescription that is perfectly tailored to your needs.

Came to Nayan Optics for an eye exam after experiencing eye fatigue during long drives. The optometrist identified a small correction that had been missed and recommended anti-reflective lenses. The new glasses have made long drives much more comfortable. Excellent diagnostic care.

The eye exam at Nayan Optics is the best value for money I have found for eye care. The examination is comprehensive, the optometrist is skilled and thorough, and the advice is genuinely useful. The price is very reasonable for the level of care provided.

My optometrist at Nayan Optics noticed that I was blinking less than normal during the examination — a sign of screen-related dry eye. They gave me practical advice on blinking exercises and screen habits that have made a real difference. This kind of holistic eye care is rare.

The eye examination at Nayan Optics includes a discussion of your family history of eye conditions. The optometrist used this information to focus on specific aspects of my examination. This personalised, risk-based approach to eye care is something I have not found elsewhere.

Visited Nayan Optics for a contact lens fitting after years of wearing glasses. The optometrist was thorough and patient, trying several different lens types before finding the one that was most comfortable for my eyes. The fitting process was careful and the result is excellent.

The optometrist at Nayan Optics explained my prescription in terms of what it means for my daily life, not just in numbers. I now understand exactly what I can and cannot see clearly without glasses and why. This practical explanation is much more useful than just a list of numbers.

My annual eye exam at Nayan Optics is always a thorough and informative experience. The optometrist tracks my prescription history and explains any changes in the context of my overall eye health. This continuity of care gives me real confidence in my eye health management.

The eye exam at Nayan Optics identified that I had developed a slight sensitivity to light that I had not noticed consciously. The optometrist recommended tinted lenses for outdoor use and the difference in comfort has been remarkable. Excellent observation and practical advice.

Came to Nayan Optics for an eye exam after my GP noticed something unusual during a routine health check. The optometrist was thorough and reassuring, and the examination confirmed that everything was fine. The peace of mind from a thorough eye exam is genuinely valuable.

The optometrist at Nayan Optics is the first one who has ever checked my binocular vision as part of a routine exam. They found a small imbalance that was causing subtle eye strain. The correction has made a noticeable difference to my comfort during close work.

My eye exam at Nayan Optics this year was the most informative I have ever had. The optometrist explained every finding in detail and gave me a clear picture of my eye health. I left feeling genuinely informed and confident about my vision care. Excellent service.

The eye examination at Nayan Optics includes a thorough assessment of your visual field. The optometrist identified a small area of reduced sensitivity that warranted monitoring. They explained it clearly and scheduled a follow-up. This proactive approach to eye health is genuinely valuable.

Visited Nayan Optics for an eye exam after noticing that I was having difficulty reading in low light. The optometrist identified a slight change in my prescription and recommended lenses with a higher light transmission. The new glasses have made reading in low light much more comfortable.

The optometrist at Nayan Optics took the time to explain the difference between my distance and near prescriptions and why they are different. I now understand my vision much better and can make more informed decisions about my glasses. This kind of education is rare and valuable.

My eye exam at Nayan Optics revealed that I had been wearing the wrong prescription for two years. The previous optometrist had made an error that had been causing subtle but persistent eye strain. The corrected prescription has made an immediate and significant difference.

The eye examination at Nayan Optics is the most comprehensive I have had anywhere. The optometrist checks not just your vision but your overall eye health, including the health of your retina, optic nerve, and cornea. This holistic approach to eye care is what everyone deserves.

Came to Nayan Optics for an eye exam after experiencing occasional flashes of light. The optometrist took this symptom seriously and did a thorough examination of my retina. Everything was fine, but I am grateful for the careful assessment. This kind of responsiveness to symptoms is important.

The optometrist at Nayan Optics identified that my reading difficulties were partly due to an uncorrected near vision problem and partly due to poor lighting habits. The new prescription combined with their advice on lighting has made reading much more comfortable.

My annual eye exam at Nayan Optics is always a thorough and reassuring experience. The optometrist is skilled, the equipment is modern, and the advice is practical and useful. I leave every year feeling confident about my eye health. Highly recommend for annual eye care.

The eye exam at Nayan Optics includes a thorough assessment of your tear film quality. The optometrist identified that I had borderline dry eye and recommended specific eye drops and lifestyle changes. The advice has made a significant difference to my eye comfort.

Visited Nayan Optics for an eye exam after my child's teacher noticed them squinting in class. The optometrist was wonderful with my child and identified significant myopia. The new glasses have transformed their school experience and their confidence. Excellent paediatric eye care.

The optometrist at Nayan Optics is the most patient and thorough I have ever encountered. They take the time to get every parameter of the prescription exactly right, even if it means repeating tests several times. The result is always a prescription that is perfectly accurate.

My eye exam at Nayan Optics this year included a discussion of the impact of my diabetes on my eye health. The optometrist explained what to watch for and scheduled more frequent monitoring. This kind of proactive, condition-specific care is genuinely valuable.

The eye examination at Nayan Optics is the best I have had in terms of the explanation provided. The optometrist explained every test, every finding, and every recommendation in clear, accessible language. I left with a thorough understanding of my eye health. Excellent communication.

Came to Nayan Optics for an eye exam after experiencing eye strain during long video calls. The optometrist identified that I needed a specific intermediate distance correction for screen work. The new glasses have made video calls much more comfortable. Practical and useful advice.

The optometrist at Nayan Optics identified that I had been unconsciously tilting my head to compensate for a vision imbalance. The corrected prescription has resolved both the vision problem and the associated neck discomfort. This kind of holistic diagnosis is rare and very valuable.

My eye exam at Nayan Optics was the first one where the optometrist asked about my hobbies and activities before starting the examination. They used this information to tailor the prescription to my specific visual demands. The result is a prescription that works perfectly for my lifestyle.

The eye examination at Nayan Optics includes a thorough assessment of your near point of convergence. The optometrist identified that I had a convergence problem that was causing eye strain during reading. The exercises they recommended have made a significant difference.

Visited Nayan Optics for an eye exam after noticing that my vision had become slightly blurry at certain distances. The optometrist was thorough and identified a small but significant change in my prescription. The new glasses have restored my vision to perfect clarity.

The optometrist at Nayan Optics is the first one who has ever explained to me the difference between myopia and hyperopia in terms that I could actually understand. This kind of patient education makes me feel genuinely informed about my eye health. Excellent communication.

My eye exam at Nayan Optics revealed early signs of cataracts that I was completely unaware of. The optometrist explained what this means, what to expect, and when to seek further treatment. This early detection is genuinely valuable for my long-term eye health.

The eye examination at Nayan Optics is thorough, professional, and genuinely caring. The optometrist takes the time to understand your concerns, conduct a comprehensive examination, and explain the findings clearly. This is the standard of eye care that everyone deserves.

Came to Nayan Optics for an eye exam after experiencing difficulty with depth perception. The optometrist identified a small but significant difference between my two eyes that had not been corrected before. The balanced prescription has resolved the depth perception issue completely.

The optometrist at Nayan Optics identified that my frequent eye infections were related to my contact lens hygiene habits. They gave me detailed advice on lens care that has completely resolved the problem. This kind of practical, preventive advice is genuinely valuable.

My annual eye exam at Nayan Optics is always the most thorough health check I have in a year. The optometrist checks not just my vision but my overall eye health, and has caught several issues early that might otherwise have gone unnoticed. Excellent preventive eye care.

The eye exam at Nayan Optics is the most comfortable and informative I have ever had. The optometrist is skilled, the equipment is modern, and the explanation is clear and accessible. I leave every visit feeling genuinely informed about my eye health. Highly recommend.

Visited Nayan Optics for an eye exam after my child's school reported concerns about their reading. The optometrist identified a significant near vision problem that had been affecting their reading ability. The new glasses have transformed their reading and their confidence at school.

The optometrist at Nayan Optics took the time to explain the impact of my high myopia on my long-term eye health. They explained the increased risks and what monitoring I should have. This kind of informed, proactive advice is something I have not found at other optical shops.

My eye exam at Nayan Optics this year was particularly thorough because I mentioned a family history of glaucoma. The optometrist did additional tests and found that my eye pressure was at the upper end of normal. They scheduled more frequent monitoring. Excellent risk-based care.

The eye examination at Nayan Optics includes a thorough assessment of your accommodation — the ability of your eyes to focus at different distances. The optometrist identified that my accommodation was slightly reduced and recommended specific exercises. Practical and useful advice.

Came to Nayan Optics for an eye exam after experiencing difficulty reading menus in restaurants. The optometrist identified that I needed a reading addition for the first time. The new progressive lenses have made reading at all distances much more comfortable. Excellent advice.

The optometrist at Nayan Optics is the most thorough and communicative I have ever encountered. They explain every test, every finding, and every recommendation clearly and patiently. I leave every visit feeling genuinely informed and confident about my eye health.

My eye exam at Nayan Optics revealed that I had been wearing contact lenses that were slightly too tight for my corneas. The optometrist recommended a different lens type and the improvement in comfort has been remarkable. This kind of detailed assessment is what makes Nayan Optics special.

The eye examination at Nayan Optics is the best I have had in terms of the time and care invested. The optometrist never rushes, always explains, and always follows up on any concerns. This is the standard of eye care that builds real trust and loyalty.

Visited Nayan Optics for an eye exam after experiencing occasional blurred vision in one eye. The optometrist was thorough and identified a small but significant change in that eye's prescription. The corrected prescription has resolved the blurring completely. Excellent diagnostic care.

The optometrist at Nayan Optics identified that my eye strain was partly due to an uncorrected prescription and partly due to poor ergonomics at my workstation. They gave me practical advice on both. The combination of the new prescription and the ergonomic changes has made a huge difference.

My annual eye exam at Nayan Optics is always a thorough and reassuring experience. The optometrist is skilled, caring, and communicative. I leave every year feeling confident about my eye health and grateful for the quality of care. Highly recommend for annual eye care.

The eye exam at Nayan Optics is the most comprehensive and informative I have ever had. The optometrist checks everything, explains everything, and gives genuinely useful advice. This is the standard of eye care that everyone deserves and that Nayan Optics consistently delivers.
